title: DC Comics, 12-Inch SUPERMAN Action Figure
features: 12-INCH ACTION FIGURE: With 11 points of articulation, pose this 12-inch SUPERMAN action figure into a variety of dynamic action poses. Unite with your favorite heroes and create your own adventures
AUTHENTIC COMIC STYLING: This articulated action figure is highly detailed, featuring a cloth cape and comic styling that brings your favorite DC superhero to life
COLLECT THEM ALL: Bring the excitement and adventure of the DC Universe home Add heroes like SUPERMAN, THE FLASH, SHAZAM and WONDER WOMAN to your action figure collection (each sold separately)
The DC Comics 12-Inch Action Figures make a great gift for fans and collectors aged 3 and up. Use your imagination to create your own epic adventures with the DC Comics 12-Inch Action Figures
description: From the manufacturer DC UNIVERSE Action Figure12 inches Bring home the thrill of the DC Universe with DC Comics 12-inch Action Figures! This 12" action figure features 11 points of articulation and an authentic comic style that brings the iconic hero to life! Put your figure in pose and help stop chaos in the universe! Collect all 12-inch DC Comics Action Figures (each sold separately) and create your own epic adventures! Detailed cartoon style This 12" action figure is the perfect addition to your collection. With a highly detailed comic style and 11 points of articulation,the figurine comes to life! Put your figure in different action positions! Stop Chaos in the universe! Use your imagination to create your own stories from the DC universe! Join iconic heroes, including SUPERMAN, FLASH and SHAZAM! (figures sold separately) and help stop chaos in the universe! Collect all Create even more epic adventures with all DC Comics 12-inch Action Figures (each sold separately)! Expand your collection of action figures with SUPERMAN, SHAZAM! and WONDER WOMAN.
